subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Zuhur
subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Book, revealed in the most melodious of tones, and they shall, of themselves, stand as testimony against all who dwell therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الکتاب قد نزلت علی احسن النغمات و انها بنفسها لیکون حجه علی من فی
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @Word of God and human limitations, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution
